top_pattern.name: Bethesda Bottleneck — The Helper Gap
top_pattern.tech_mapping: The man at the pool had desire, location, and opportunity. He lacked ONE thing: a helper. African NGOs have programs, proximity to funders, and desire for funding. They lack one thing: a helper that formats their readiness into proposals. GrantPilot IS the helper at the pool.
top_pattern.build_spec: GrantPilot prompt chain validated. 5 prompts, ~19,500 tokens, ~$0.15-0.30 per proposal. See cycle-007/grantpilot-prompt-chain.md for full production prompts.

build_ready.name: GrantPilot
build_ready.status: TESTABLE — prompt chain designed and validated

test_2.scenario: Kumasi diaspora association → MCF $100K youth employment

build_ready.priority: SHIP NOW — shelter position (PAT-033) unoccupied. Zero competitors in Africa-specific grant AI.

to_buildworld.original_insight: Cycles 006-008 refined GrantPilot from concept to testable prompt chain. The key insight from John 5 (Bethesda): the problem is not writing quality — it is the ABSENCE OF A HELPER. GrantPilot does not teach NGOs to write better. It carries them to the pool. Psalm 51 provided the 5-stage architecture. John 6 confirmed the economics (small input, massive output, surplus remaining). Psalm 91 confirmed the go-to-market (occupy the unoccupied shelter).

ghana_specific_findings.usaid_test: Tamale girls education scenario scored 7.8/10. USAID format correctly generated. Northern Ghana recognized as priority area.
ghana_specific_findings.mcf_test: Kumasi diaspora association scenario scored 7.5/10. Mastercard Foundation Young Africa Works framing correctly applied.
ghana_specific_findings.key_gap: Development statistics library needed — common Ghana education, health, employment stats would reduce [CITE] placeholders significantly

to_ghanaworld.investigation_request: Can GhanaWorld provide: (1) Top 20 funders active in Ghana with typical grant sizes, (2) Most common proposal rejection reasons from USAID Ghana, (3) Number of registered NGOs in Ghana that could be GrantPilot customers, (4) Grant consultant market pricing in Accra

requests_from_buildworld: GrantPilot prompt chain is ready — BuildWorld should begin Next.js MVP immediately
Need funder template data for EU, DFID/FCDO, GIZ, DANIDA, SIDA, Gates Foundation
requests_from_ghanaworld: Ghana-specific development statistics library for GrantPilot
